store.name: Shade Frame Studio
store.tagline: Repair the shade. Keep the lamp.

products.name: Drum Shade Recovery Kit
products.description: A complete recovery set for a clean drum shade refresh with lampshade styrene, linen covering, binding tape, seam tape, clips, measuring card, and project notebook.

products.name: Pleated Bedside Shade Kit
products.description: Materials and bench tools for recovering a softer pleated bedside shade with cotton print, curve template, trim cord, clips, and edge finish supplies.

products.name: Parchment Empire Shade Kit
products.description: A warm paper-translucency kit for tapered empire shade work with parchment sheets, shade glue, seam tape, burnisher, and proportion guide.

products.name: Cracked-Liner Repair Kit
products.description: Repair supplies for brittle or split liners: styrene sheet, adhesive, double-sided tape, diffuser sheet, heat-safe work mat, repair label, and care card.

products.name: Thrifted-Base Fitting Bundle
products.description: A hardware bundle for matching a found lamp base to the right shade proportion and fitting style.

products.name: Wire Frame & Ring Set
products.description: Matched top and bottom rings with wire frame options and spider fitting support for drum, empire, and bedside shade builds.

products.name: Linen & Parchment Swatch Pack
products.description: A tactile swatch set for testing room glow before choosing a shade covering.

products.name: Shade Bench Tool Roll
products.description: Repeatable bench tools for shade making and repair, organized for cutting, clipping, measuring, rolling, and burnishing.

products.name: Reading-Lamp Refresh
products.description: A room-focused bundle with diffuser support, warm parchment covering, harp riser, and proportion guidance for a chair-side lamp.

products.name: Pair-of-Nightstands Recovery Set
products.description: Materials for recovering two bedside shades with matched proportions and finish details.

products.name: Midcentury Drum Kit
products.description: A drum shade bundle for a thrifted midcentury base with frame, styrene, silk-look fabric, reducer hardware, finial, and edge roller.

products.name: Rental-Friendly Shade Upgrade Pack
products.description: A non-permanent lighting upgrade pack for renters using clip-on fittings, diffuser sheets, cotton print covering, and finish supplies.
